kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either 12 coins goes with Millpond or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Millpond.
At most one of Cedric, the Cooper, and the artisan who makes Rope belongs to the Market Ward.
12 coins, 14 coins, and 16 coins go with Weaver, Horseshoes, and Millpond, in some order.
At least two of (the members of the Joiners' Guild and Cedric) belong to the Market Ward.
Riverside goes with at least two of Cedric, Weaver, Rope, and 15 coins.
Either Godfrey belongs to the Market Ward or both members of the Clothiers' Guild belong to the Market Ward (but not both).
14 coins goes with at most one of Carpenter, Horseshoes, and Highrow.
Aldric, Carpenter, Tapestries, and 16 coins belong to different artisans.
Aldric goes with at least two of Blacksmith, Pottery, Riverside, and 14 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Cedric goes with 16 coins; Blacksmith goes with 15 coins; Carpenter goes with 12 coins.
Between Aldric and Edmund, one goes with Boots and the other with Highrow.
Oldwall goes with exactly three of Godfrey, Mason, Tapestries, and 12 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Either 2 lb goes with Grayreach or someone in the Catfish Family goes with Grayreach.
At most one of Esther, the angler who landed the Catfish, and the angler using the Swimbait belongs to the North Watershed.
2 lb, 4 lb, and 6 lb go with Perch, Spinnerbait, and Grayreach, in some order.
At least two of (the members of the Pike Family and Esther) belong to the North Watershed.
Pinehollow goes with at least two of Esther, Perch, Swimbait, and 5 lb.
Either Royce belongs to the North Watershed or both members of the Catfish Family belong to the North Watershed (but not both).
4 lb goes with at most one of Bluegill, Spinnerbait, and Foxglen.
Cody, Bluegill, Wobbler, and 6 lb belong to different catches.
Cody goes with at least two of Bass, Spoon, Pinehollow, and 4 lb.
Exactly one of these is true: Esther goes with 6 lb; Bass goes with 5 lb; Bluegill goes with 2 lb.
Between Cody and Mabel, one goes with Crankbait and the other with Foxglen.
Mossbank goes with exactly three of Royce, Crappie, Wobbler, and 2 lb.
